name: morningstar
description: MorningStar — autonomous coding agent for Claude Code. Turns Notion and Jira PRDs into shipped pull requests with a 24/7 queue processor and two-way Slack Q&A.

plugins.name: morningstar
plugins.description: Autonomous coding agent that turns Notion and Jira PRDs into shipped pull requests. Reads requirements, analyzes the codebase, generates a task plan, implements each task with tests, commits, and opens a PR. Includes a 24/7 GitHub Actions queue processor and two-way Slack Q&A.
